sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Windows Defender Tampering Via Wmic.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects potential tampering with Windows Defender settings such as adding exclusion using wmic

values.CommandLine: WMIC /Namespace:\\root\Microsoft\Windows\Defender class MSFT_MpPreference call Add ExclusionExtension=\".dll\"
WMIC /Namespace:\\root\Microsoft\Windows\Defender class MSFT_MpPreference call Add ExclusionPath=\"\Temp\\"
WMIC /Namespace:\\root\Microsoft\Windows\Defender class MSFT_MpPreference call Add ExclusionPath=\"C:\Program Files (x86)\IObit\iobit.dll\"

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects the use of Tor or Tor-Browser to connect to onion routing networks
Detects modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry.
sigma_analysis_results.rule_author: Victor Sergeev, Daniil Yugoslavskiy, Gleb Sukhodolskiy, Timur Zinniatullin, oscd.community, Tim Shelton, frack113 (split)

sigma_analysis_results.rule_title: Potential Persistence Attempt Via Run Keys Using Reg.EXE
sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects suspicious command line reg.exe tool adding key to RUN key in Registry

values.CommandLine: REG ADD "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" /V "IObit License Manager" /t REG_SZ /F /D "rundll32 \"C:\Program Files (x86)\IObit\iobit.dll\",DllEntry

sigma_analysis_results.rule_description: Detects direct modification of autostart extensibility point (ASEP) in registry using reg.exe.

values.CommandLine: REG ADD "HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run" /V "IObit License Manager" /t REG_SZ /F /D "rundll32 \"C:\Program Files (x86)\IObit\iobit.dll\",DllEntry

crowdsourced_yara_results.description: UPX dump on OEP (original entry point)
crowdsourced_yara_results.author: kevoreilly
